prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A character stands at a three-way fork in a road. Left path (red-tinted, labeled "Duplication"): leads to a cluttered desk with three nearly identical function copies, a stressed developer surrounded by redundant paperwork. Middle path (orange-tinted, labeled "any"): leads past skull-and-crossbones danger signs, with a blindfolded figure stumbling toward a cliff edge. Right path (green-tinted, labeled "Generics"): leads to a sunny meadow where a developer confidently holds a single flexible template card with a "<T>" badge. The right path is clearly the best choice. Signposts mark each path.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
